desc.zh: 持仓标的中间价达到此价格时自动触发止盈平仓。价格区间为 [0.5, 1.0]。
desc.en: Auto take-profit when the held token's mid price reaches this level. Range [0.5, 1.0].

disable_note.zh: 设为 1.0：市场价格最高趋近 1，止盈永不触发
disable_note.en: Set to 1.0: price never reaches 1, TP never fires

desc.zh: 持仓标的中间价跌破此价格时自动触发止损平仓。价格区间为 [0.0, 1.0]。
desc.en: Auto stop-loss when the held token's mid price falls below this level. Range [0.0, 1.0].

disable_note.zh: 设为 0.0：价格不会跌至 0，止损永不触发
disable_note.en: Set to 0.0: price never falls to 0, SL never fires

desc.zh: 市场到期前剩余秒数不足此值时，强制平掉所有持仓，防止在到期时刻持有未结仓位。区间为 [0, 300]。
desc.en: Force-close all positions when remaining seconds fall below this threshold, preventing open positions at expiry. Range [0, 300].

disable_note.zh: 设为 0：不提前强制平仓，持仓直至市场结算
disable_note.en: Set to 0: no early force-close, positions held until settlement

desc.zh: 只在中间价高于此阈值的标的上入场，用于过滤价格过低、流动性差的尾盘标的。区间为 [0.01, 1.0]。
desc.en: Only consider tokens whose mid price is above this threshold, filtering out illiquid low-priced markets. Range [0.01, 1.0].

disable_note.zh: 设为 0.01（最小值）：所有入场候选均可通过，价格过滤实际失效
disable_note.en: Set to 0.01 (min): all entry candidates pass, price filter effectively disabled

desc.zh: 只允许在市场剩余时间（秒）低于此阈值时入场，避免在市场初期不确定性过高时进场。1 tick ≈ 1 秒。
desc.en: Only allow entry when remaining time (seconds) is below this threshold, avoiding early entry when uncertainty is high. 1 tick ≈ 1 second.

disable_note.zh: 设为 86400（24小时）：剩余时间几乎不会超过此值，入场时间限制实际失效，任意时刻均可入场
disable_note.en: Set to 86400 (24h): remaining time rarely exceeds this, time gate effectively disabled, entry allowed at any time

desc.zh: 单次入场使用的最小仓位比例（占可用资金），保证每次入场具有一定規模。区间为 [0.01, 1.0]。
desc.en: Minimum position size (fraction of available capital) per entry, ensuring a minimum trade size. Range [0.01, 1.0].

disable_note.zh: 设为 0.01（最小值）：下限几乎无绳束，仓位大小由 position_max_pct 决定
disable_note.en: Set to 0.01 (min): lower bound almost unconstrained, size determined by position_max_pct

desc.zh: 单次入场使用的最大仓位比例（占可用资金），防止应仓过重。合理设置可控制单笔交易风险暖。区间为 [0.01, 1.0]。
desc.en: Maximum position size (fraction of available capital) per entry, preventing excessive concentration. Range [0.01, 1.0].

disable_note.zh: 设为 1.0：不限制仓位上限，允许全仓入场（高风险，谨慎使用）
disable_note.en: Set to 1.0: no cap on position size, full capital entry allowed (high risk, use with caution)

desc.zh: 第一段趋势检测窗口时长（分钟）。从session开始时刻往后的N分钟，用于计算第一段涨跌幅 a1。
desc.en: Duration (minutes) of the first trend detection window from session start. Used to compute the first price change ratio a1.

desc.zh: 第二段趋势检测窗口时长（分钟）。紧接窗口1之后的N分钟，用于计算第二段涨跌幅 a2。必须大于窗口1的值。
desc.en: Duration (minutes) of the second trend detection window following window 1. Used to compute the second price change ratio a2. Must be greater than window 1.

label.zh: BTC趋势过滤（最小动量阈值）

desc.zh: 启用BTC趋势过滤。回测前根据BTC价格的两段涨跌幅判断趋势方向和强度，|a1+a2| 必须大于此阈值才允许入场。值越大，仅允许更强的趋势通过。添加时自动引入两个检测窗口参数。
desc.en: Enable BTC trend filter. Compute BTC price trend from two time windows before the session. |a1+a2| must exceed this threshold to allow entry. Higher values filter out weak trends. Both trend windows are auto-included.
